pass_condition: tuner/mic calibration logged before any pitch row

target_value: one reed_id and mouthpiece_id recorded in reed-mouthpiece-capture-template.csv
environment: same setup ID must appear in prototype/tuning logs
pass_condition: selected setup has reed/mouthpiece identity, gap, onset pressure, response, and leak status
blocking_unknowns: reed model/strength, mouthpiece model/facing, onset pressure, response
action: Do not compare pitch sessions until reed/mouthpiece IDs match.

target_value: bore stations plus trim state recorded in bore-trim-capture-template.csv
environment: measure before and after bell/foot trim
pass_condition: bore profile and trim history are tied to all-closed measured pitch with the same setup IDs
blocking_unknowns: reed-seat datum, bore station values, measured root pitch
action: Resolve taper/ovalization or datum mismatch before drilling final holes.

tolerance: +/- 15 cents before final tuning; +/- 8 cents after
pass_condition: all-closed pitch is logged with reed_id, mouthpiece_id, bore_profile_id, response, and onset pressure
action: Trim bell end shorter to sharpen; add temporary tape/extension if sharp.

environment: same reed_id, mouthpiece_id, bore_profile_id, and blowing pressure
pass_condition: H01-H07 final rows are within tolerance with response_rating_1_5 >= 3
blocking_unknowns: final hole diameters, measured_hz, cents_error, response
action: Open hole diameter to sharpen; use wax/tape collar to flatten during tests.

target_value: response_rating_1_5 >= 3 and onset_pressure_in_h2o recorded for all closed plus H01-H07
tolerance: no missing response rows in tuning-capture-template.csv
environment: same reed/mouthpiece setup as tone-hole sweep
pass_condition: every accepted tuning row has onset pressure, response, leak check, and action if response is poor
blocking_unknowns: onset pressure, leak result, response for every note
action: If a note speaks late or chirps, fix leak/reed setup before enlarging holes.

target_value: no visible leak under leak light; suction holds 10 s
tolerance: zero audible hiss at normal blowing pressure
pass_condition: K01/K02 pitch rows are accepted only after a leak-light or suction pass
blocking_unknowns: pad seating evidence, suction duration, keyed response
action: Reseat pad, regulate cork, or lap tone-hole rim.

target_value: note + 19 semitones if vent is clarinet-like
tolerance: document response only; not a first-build pass/fail
environment: same reed and embouchure as low-register test
pass_condition: register behavior is logged as research and does not promote first-build readiness
blocking_unknowns: stable low-register response, measured vent response
action: Move/resize vent only after the core chalumeau speaks well.
